title: keraselma spatulatum
intro: Keraselma spatulatum, also known as the Spatulate Keraselma, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Northern Europe and Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also extend to its antispasmodic and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. Keraselma spatulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, with some traditional remedies also involving the use of its roots and leaves in combination with other herbs.
